name_cn:
MCM Aren Visetos
Small Boston Bag
 💰Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
This Aren Boston bag offers a new interpretation of the classic silhouette, paying tribute to MCM's travel roots. Its shape evokes a weekend travel bag, featuring clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. Exquisitely crafted with meticulous attention to detail, the top handle is hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted.
Size: 23*11*15cm
Strap: Removable/Adjustable 102-118cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾
